message:
test(index): add comprehensive unit tests for index.rs

Adds 25 unit tests covering:
- expand_path: path expansion with ~ handling (6 tests)
- IndexArgs: argument parsing for all flags (8 tests)
- discover_skill_files: skill discovery across roots (8 tests)
- compute_spec_hash: SHA256 hashing determinism (3 tests)

Tests cover edge cases including nonexistent paths, nested
directories, multiple roots with different layers, and hash
consistency verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
